summary: Behavior Engine (Addiction Loop) VERIFIED - ALL 17 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + ALL FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Session memory, momentum tracking, real-time profile updates, variable reward injection, recovery system, infinite scroll, and dynamic hook timing all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: engagement.py: POST /api/engagement/feed-event returns session with momentum, actions, should_rerank, recovery_needed, intensity - VERIFIED
engagement.py: feed-event updates session momentum (+2 for continue_click, -1 for skip_fast) - VERIFIED
engagement.py: Recovery triggers at 3+ consecutive skips (recovery_needed=true) - VERIFIED
engagement.py: GET /api/engagement/story-feed/more returns stories, offset, has_more, cdn_base, session_intensity - VERIFIED
engagement.py: High offset (150) returns empty stories with has_more=false - VERIFIED
personalization_service.py: MOMENTUM_DELTAS define per-event momentum changes - VERIFIED
personalization_service.py: RECOVERY_SKIP_THRESHOLD=3 for recovery detection - VERIFIED
personalization_service.py: inject_variable_rewards() spikes high-score items at random intervals (3-9) - VERIFIED
personalization_service.py: apply_recovery() shuffles content when user skips 3+ items - VERIFIED
personalization_service.py: get_session_intensity() returns low/medium/high based on momentum - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Infinite scroll state (extraStories, scrollOffset, hasMore, loadingMore) - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Scroll event listener calls updateScrollSpeed() - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Soft breaks every 12 items with 'Try something different?' CTA - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: StoryCard tracks visibility for skip detection via IntersectionObserver - VERIFIED
feedTracker.js: sendFeedEvent() sends events to /api/engagement/feed-event - VERIFIED
feedTracker.js: fetchMoreStories() calls /api/engagement/story-feed/more - VERIFIED
feedTracker.js: updateScrollSpeed() tracks scroll speed for dynamic hook timing - VERIFIED
feedTracker.js: getDynamicHookDelay() returns 0/200/500ms based on scroll speed - VERIFIED
feedTracker.js: wasSkippedFast() detects skips (visible < 1.5s) - VERIFIED
StoryCardMedia.jsx: Tracks visibility via IntersectionObserver for skip detection - VERIFIED
videoController.js: Singleton controller with max 1 video at a time - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing stories and user profile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Behavior Engine (Addiction Loop) fully verified. Key findings: 1) POST /api/engagement/feed-event returns session with momentum (0-10), actions, should_rerank, recovery_needed, intensity (low/medium/high), 2) continue_click adds +2 momentum, skip_fast adds -1, 3) Recovery triggers at 3+ consecutive skips, 4) GET /api/engagement/story-feed/more returns stories with pagination (offset, has_more), 5) Dashboard has 164 story cards, 55 CDN images, 55 blur placeholders, 2 video elements with muted/playsInline/loop, 6) Infinite scroll sentinel exists, 7) StoryCard tracks visibility for skip detection.

feed_event_click_returns_session.details: POST /api/engagement/feed-event with event_type=click returns session with momentum, actions, should_rerank, recovery_needed, intensity

feed_event_skip_fast_triggers_recovery.details: POST /api/engagement/feed-event with 3x skip_fast events shows recovery_needed=true and consecutive_skips=3

feed_event_continue_click_momentum_incre.details: POST /api/engagement/feed-event with event_type=continue_click shows momentum increase (+2)

story_feed_more_returns_correct_fields.details: GET /api/engagement/story-feed/more?offset=0&limit=4 returns stories array, offset, has_more, cdn_base, session_intensity

story_feed_more_high_offset_empty.details: GET /api/engagement/story-feed/more?offset=150 returns empty stories and has_more=false

dashboard_loads_with_hero_rows_cards.details: Dashboard container, hero section, metrics strip, 164 story cards, features grid all render

infinite_scroll_sentinel_exists.details: Infinite scroll sentinel element found in DOM

preview_video_attributes.details: 2 video elements with muted, playsInline, loop attributes

scroll_event_listener.details: Dashboard has scroll event listener for scroll speed tracking

story_card_visibility_tracking.details: 74 StoryCardMedia components with IntersectionObserver for skip detection

feed_api_thumb_blur.details: Feed API returns thumb_blur objects with type inline_base64
